info.name: 3D Viewer
info.summary: View, analyze & export 3D models with 10+ formats, auto-thumbnails, personal settings, annotations, measurements & rendering
info.description:
A comprehensive 3D model viewer that allows you to view, interact with, and analyze 3D models directly within Nextcloud. Supports 10+ formats including GLB, GLTF, OBJ, STL, PLY, FBX, 3MF, and 3DS with full material and texture support.
**📦 Format Support:** - 🎨 Multi-format support: GLB, GLTF, OBJ+MTL, STL, PLY, FBX, 3MF, 3DS, DAE, X3D, VRML - 🚀 Enhanced loaders: Significantly improved FBX, VRML, and DAE loaders with better material and texture support - 📁 Multi-file models: Full support for OBJ+MTL+textures and GLTF+bins+images - 🗜️ Compression: DRACO geometry and KTX2/Basis texture compression (needs more work) - 🔧 Centralized format definitions: Single source of truth for all format definitions ensuring consistency - ✅ Format sync validation: Automated tests ensure format consistency across backend, frontend, and MIME registration - 📦 Bundle budget enforcement: Automated bundle size checking with historical tracking and CI integration - 🛠️ G-code toolpaths: Support for `.gcode`, `.gco`, `.nc`, `.acode` with 3D toolpath visualization (smooth rainbow gradient coloring, travel/retraction filtering, automatic layer detection) - 🧩 Extended G-code ecosystem: Recognizes additional variants `.g`, `.gx` (FlashForge), `.g3drem` (Dremel), `.makerbot`, `.thing` with proper MIME mappings
**🎮 Interactive Features:** - 🎯 3D Camera Controller: Enhanced intuitive circular controller for precise camera navigation with improved controls - 🔄 Model comparison: Side-by-side viewing with synchronized controls - 📝 Annotations: Add notes and markers to specific points on models (always readable, faces camera) with customizable visual sizing controls - 📏 Measurements: Distance and angle measurement tools (with billboard text) with per-user sizing controls for point size, line thickness, and label width - 🎬 Animation Controls: Play/pause controls for animated models with loop toggle, timeline scrubber, and frame stepping - ✂️ Cross-Section: Interactive clipping plane to slice models along X/Y/Z axes for interior inspection - 💡 Lighting Presets: Quick-switch between Default, Studio, Outdoor, Dramatic, and Flat lighting setups - 🔖 View Bookmarks: Save and restore camera positions with display state (grid, axes, wireframe, background) - 💥 Exploded View: Animate multi-mesh models outward from centroid with adjustable factor slider - 🧭 Face labels: Orientation markers (TOP, BOTTOM, FRONT, BACK, LEFT, RIGHT) - 👁️ Camera projection toggle: Switch between perspective and orthographic views - ⚙️ Personal Settings: User-specific preferences and settings page in Nextcloud personal settings
**📂 File Browser:** - 🗂️ Smart navigation: Toggle between Viewer, Folders, Type, Date, and Favorites modes - 📋 List and Grid views: Switch between compact list view and grid view with customizable default preference - ⚙️ Default view setting: Set your preferred view mode (Grid/List) in Personal Settings - ⌨️ Keyboard navigation: Full keyboard support for list view (Arrow keys, Home, End, Enter, Space) - 🍞 Breadcrumb navigation: Easy navigation back through folder/type/date hierarchies - 🔄 Lazy loading: Fast navigation with on-demand data loading
**⚡ Export & Tools:** - 📷 Screenshot capture: Take high-quality PNG/JPEG screenshots of your models - 💾 Export models to GLB, STL, and OBJ formats - 🖨️ Slicer integration: Send models directly to PrusaSlicer, Cura, BambuStudio, OrcaSlicer, Simplify3D, Eufy Studio, and AnycubicSlicer with enhanced security (file size limits, MIME validation, rolling expiration) - 📊 Model statistics panel with detailed information - 🔲 Wireframe and bounding box visualization - 📐 Dynamic grid system that adapts to model size and position - ❓ Help panel with comprehensive in-app documentation
**🚀 Performance & UX:** - 🖼️ Automatic thumbnails: Smart thumbnail generation with content-aware cropping (configurable in settings) - 🖼️ Progressive texture loading for improved performance - 💿 Dependency caching using IndexedDB for faster multi-file loading with live cache statistics (size, entries, hit rate) - ⚙️ Performance modes with visual quality overlay and automatic suggestions for large models - 📊 Performance scaling: Automatic performance mode suggestions based on model complexity (triangle count thresholds) - 📦 Code splitting and dynamic imports - 📱 Mobile-optimized UI: Responsive toolbar (icons-only on small screens), full-screen help panel with sticky header, and performance stats hidden by default on mobile (≤768px) - 🌓 Light and dark theme support with RTL layout - 🔗 Works with public shares and authenticated users - ♿ Accessibility features with keyboard navigation and ARIA labels
Built with Three.js for high-performance WebGL rendering. ✨
info.author: Mazin Al Saadi

donation.title: Donate to the developers with PayPal
